case_title: LIWEN GEE VS. CHERY DEANER et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-28-2004 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, LIWEN AS TO DEFENDANT DEANER, CHERY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-19-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-04-2003
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT JURY REQUESTED FILED BY DEFENDANT DEANER, CHERYL INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS CHERY DEANER ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JAMES TIMOTHY MCDONALD.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DEANER, CHERYL INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS CHERY DEANER
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-04-2004.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-28-2004 CONTINUED TO JUL-06-2004 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUN-28-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR TIMOTHY DALTON REGAN.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-23-2004. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-29-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. DEC-19-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY CHEN, DAVID W.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-06-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DAVID G. LEACH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-05-2004 THROUGH JUN-03-2004.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
